# Resume For You — llms.txt
# https://resume4u.help/

## What is Resume For You?

Resume For You (resume4u.help) is a free, AI-powered resume builder and portfolio website generator. It helps job seekers create professional, ATS-optimised resumes and shareable portfolio websites in minutes — no sign-up or account required.

## Key Facts

- **Product**: Free AI Resume Builder + Portfolio Website Generator
- **URL**: https://resume4u.help/
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Pricing**: Free to build and use. PDF download from ₹9 (India) / $0.99 (international). Portfolio website generation is free.
- **No sign-up required**: Users can build and download a resume without creating an account.
- **Templates**: 35+ professional resume templates (modern, minimal, creative, corporate, dark, coloured)
- **AI model**: Uses Claude (Anthropic) for resume content generation
- **ATS**: All resumes are ATS (Applicant Tracking System) optimised
- **Portfolio**: Generates a shareable personal portfolio website from resume data
- **Download formats**: PDF, Word (.docx)
- **Languages**: English (primary), supports Indian names and formatting

## What it does

1. User fills in basic info, work experience, education, skills, and custom sections
2. AI generates professional bullet points, summaries, and portfolio content
3. User selects from 35+ templates
4. Resume is generated and can be downloaded as PDF or Word
5. Portfolio website can be generated and shared via a link or downloaded as HTML

## Who it's for

- Freshers and recent graduates (especially in India)
- Professionals updating their resume
- Anyone applying to jobs on Naukri, LinkedIn, or company portals
- Developers who want a portfolio website
- International users seeking affordable resume tools

## Authoritative content pages

- Main app: https://resume4u.help/
- Free resume builder: https://resume4u.help/free-resume-builder/

- Portfolio website builder: https://resume4u.help/portfolio-website-builder/
- Resume templates: https://resume4u.help/resume-templates/
- Cover letter generator: https://resume4u.help/cover-letter-generator/

## Common questions this product answers

- How do I build a resume for free?
- What is the best free AI resume builder?
- How do I make my resume ATS-friendly?
- How do I create a portfolio website for free?
- What is the best resume builder for freshers in India?
- How do I write bullet points for my resume?
- Can AI write my resume for me?
- What resume templates pass ATS screening?

## Crawling guidance

All pages on resume4u.help are publicly accessible and suitable for indexing. Portfolio pages at /p/:slug are user-generated and change frequently. The main app at / contains the primary product functionality.
